_doc: Synthetic fixtures hand-authored from the execute-query-failures playbook signature (Branch 1 — null / out-of-scope connection). Replace with verbatim captures from a real .local/investigations/ before treating as a regression signal (see ../_shared/scripts/generate_scenario.py).

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key a1b2c3d4-2e8c-4f6b-9d5a-1c2b3d4e5f6a --state Faulted --output json
or jobs logs e1f2a3b4-1f5d-4e8c-9b6a-2d3e4f5a6b7c --level Error --output json

rules._doc: Proxy open-ended docsai queries to the real uip CLI; cache results in _cache/.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns []. Lets the agent explore beyond the recorded path.
